_comment: Normalized payload contract (INT-007): every hook command that dispatches to a skill MUST expose EVENT, PROJECT, TIMESTAMP. UserPromptSubmit hooks read the prompt from stdin (the hook JSON, via input=$(cat)) — NOT from $USER_PROMPT, and NOT wrapped in bash -c '...' (an apostrophe inside the echo text closes the single quote and crashes the hook with 'unexpected EOF'). Keep these command strings byte-identical to what ships in settings.json so the installer's exact-string dedup makes re-installs idempotent.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f ~/.squirrel/state.json ]; then echo "💡 squirrel: detected a previous session. Run /sq-start to resume context, or /sq-where-am-i for a diagnostic."; fi'
input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q '<!-- SQUIRREL-PACKAGE'; then echo '📦 Package detected — the squirrel:sync-in skill will process it.'; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -iqE '(decided|chose|let.s (use|go with)|going with|we concluded|we.ll use)'; then echo '💡 Detected decision language. Consider /sq-decision to capture it as an ADR.'; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -iqE '(send an update|update to @|email (my lead|sarah|the team)|standup|status update)'; then echo '💡 If you are about to communicate status, run /sq-brief to generate it structured.'; fi

bash -c 'if [ -f ~/.squirrel/state.json ]; then SESSION_AGE=$(($(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y ~/.squirrel/state.json 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m ~/.squirrel/state.json))); if [ $SESSION_AGE -gt 1800 ]; then echo "⏰ Session >30min with no shutdown. Consider /sq-end to save context."; fi; fi'
